ItacPersonItem.Notes: He was appointed Secretary in the Republic of Ragusa in 1558. He went to Rome in 1561, where he took part to the Accademia delle Notti Vaticante. See his biography by A. Buiatti, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
